subcodes.first_line: O Physician of troubled hearts! Upon every chronic ailment bestow the healing remedy of the Covenant, and to every incurable affliction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب دلهای پریشان هر مرض مزمنی را دریاق فاروق میثاق ده و هر درد بیدرمانرا
subcodes.subjects: @Greatest Name, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
